args:
set -eu
for path in \
  vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_serving_structured_output.py \
  vllm/vllm/entrypoints/openai/responses/serving.py \
  vllm/vllm/entrypoints/openai/run_batch.py \
  vllm/tests/entrypoints/anthropic/test_anthropic_messages_conversion.py \
  vllm/vllm/engine/arg_utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/benchmarks/serve.py
 do
  [ -f "$path" ]
 done
rg -n 'structured_outputs|run_batch|serving|anthropic|arg_utils|benchmark' \
  vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_serving_structured_output.py \
  vllm/vllm/entrypoints/openai/responses/serving.py \
  vllm/vllm/entrypoints/openai/run_batch.py \
  vllm/tests/entrypoints/anthropic/test_anthropic_messages_conversion.py \
  vllm/vllm/engine/arg_utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/benchmarks/serve.py >/dev/null
fozzy explore tests/explore.materialization_surface_matrix.fozzy.json --json >/dev/null
printf 'explore-vllm-serving-entrypoints\n'
